title: Sensor Task Descriptor
description: A descriptor for a scheduled QA sensor task. Implements Pattern VIII of the Integral Knowledge Architecture methodology.

schedule.description: Cron expression or human description (e.g., 'daily 7am UTC', 'weekly Sunday 8pm', '0 7 * * *').

surface.description: What this sensor monitors (e.g., 'web URLs', 'vault classification frontmatter', 'companion RAG index', 'translation staleness across all languages').

detects.description: Failure modes this sensor catches. Each item is a short prose description.

report_destination.description: Where reports are written (e.g., 'Internal/Digital/System Reports/{date}-website-health.md', 'sensor-reports/', stdout).

detect_and_report_only.description: MUST be true. Sensors detect; they do not modify. Auto-repair masks failure modes.

deltas_only.description: Whether the sensor reports only on changes from previous run (recommended) or every run.

audience_tag.description: Frontmatter tag for the report file, used by the AI companion's exclusion filter.

implementation.description: Implementation notes — language, dependencies, entry point. The descriptor is the spec; implementation is tradition-specific.
